name: xscope0-modifed-router
description: xscope0 Modifed Router - fork of 9router with extra provider automation

scripts.dev: nodemon -I --watch cli.js --watch src --watch hooks --ext js,json cli.js

comment_sqlite: sql.js + better-sqlite3 are NOT bundled here. They are installed into ~/.xscope0/runtime/node_modules by hooks/postinstall.js (and re-checked at runtime by cli.js). This avoids Windows EBUSY errors when updating the global CLI, since native .node files no longer live under the locked install dir.
comment_systray: systray2 is NOT bundled here. It is lazy-installed into ~/.xscope0/runtime/node_modules by hooks/postinstall.js on macOS/Linux only. Windows uses PowerShell NotifyIcon (zero binary). This avoids shipping unsigned Go binaries that trigger antivirus false positives (Kaspersky). We use the systray2 fork because the legacy systray@1.0.5 ships a 2017 x86_64 binary that fails on modern macOS dyld.
